title: 'Stranger Things 5' Becomes Netflix's No. 9 Most Popular English-Language Series of All Time With 105.7 Million Views So Far
text: The fifth season of Stranger Things has achieved significant milestone status on Netflix's viewership rankings. The season accumulated 105.7 million views and secured the ninth position among the streamer's most-watched English-language series since its finale dropped on New Year's Eve. Netflix's ranking methodology tracks viewership during each title's first 91 days of availability. For the batched releases of Stranger Things Season 5, Volume 1 released November 26 will count views through February 24, Volume 2 released December 25 through March 25, and the finale released December 31 through March 31. The series surpassed Fool Me Once on the all-time chart and exceeded Season 1 of The Night Agent. Season 4 remains Netflix's third-ranked series with 140.7 million views, trailing only Wednesday Season 1 with 252.1 million and Adolescence with 142.6 million.
